use_cases: Display economic events with impact indicators on trading and fintech platforms
Show market-moving news data in financial dashboards with volatility indicators
Present forex economic calendar data with horizontal scrolling navigation
Track economic releases with actual, forecast, and prior value comparisons
Organize financial event data in a calendar-style list view for traders
ai_summary: Interactive economic calendar component for displaying market-moving economic events with country codes, times, and impact levels. Features horizontal scroll navigation with directional buttons, volatility indicators showing high/medium/low impact, and tabular data display for actual, forecast, and prior values. Built with Framer Motion animations and shadcn-compatible utility classes for a clean, professional fintech interface.
